name: Baked Beans a La Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and sort the beans.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil. Boil 2 minutes and remove from heat.
3. Let soak for 2 hours.
4. Bring to a boil again and simmer about an hour, until cooked but not soft or mushy.
5. Drain the beans.
6. Add the rest of the ingredients to the beans and stir well.
7. Place in the crockpot and cook on low for 10-12 hours.
OR
Add 1/2 cup tomato juice. Cover tightly and cook in a 200°F oven overnight.
